heading: Omitted
label: 958 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized band to organize a legal entity and to request the Secretary of the Interior to transfer to such entity title to lands in the reserves established by former , was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 86–339, § 873 Stat. 605section 953 of this titleSept. 21, 1959
